title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Ludhiana. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd!
